'''âs-m-sh''' ('''kasamash''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:queue|queue]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-m-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:queue|queue]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âs-m-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kasamash
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisamash|thisamash]] || [[word:jisamash|jisamash]] || [[word:shisamash|shisamash]] || [[word:kisamash|kisamash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusamash|thuthusamash]] || [[word:jujusamash|jujusamash]] || [[word:shushusamash|shushusamash]] || [[word:kukusamash|kukusamash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusamash|thusamash]] || [[word:jusamash|jusamash]] || [[word:shusamash|shusamash]] || [[word:kusamash|kusamash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusamash|thusamash]] || [[word:jusamash|jusamash]] || [[word:shusamash|shusamash]] || [[word:kusamash|kusamash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesamash|thesamash]] || [[word:jesamash|jesamash]] || [[word:shesamash|shesamash]] || [[word:kesamash|kesamash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosamash|thothosamash]] || [[word:jojosamash|jojosamash]] || [[word:shoshosamash|shoshosamash]] || [[word:kokosamash|kokosamash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosamash|thosamash]] || [[word:josamash|josamash]] || [[word:shosamash|shosamash]] || [[word:kosamash|kosamash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosamash|thosamash]] || [[word:josamash|josamash]] || [[word:shosamash|shosamash]] || [[word:kosamash|kosamash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠsamash|thĂŠsamash]] || [[word:jĂŠsamash|jĂŠsamash]] || [[word:shĂŠsamash|shĂŠsamash]] || [[word:kĂŠsamash|kĂŠsamash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasamash|thathasamash]] || [[word:jajasamash|jajasamash]] || [[word:shashasamash|shashasamash]] || [[word:kakasamash|kakasamash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasamash|thasamash]] || [[word:jasamash|jasamash]] || [[word:shasamash|shasamash]] || [[word:kasamash|kasamash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasamash|thasamash]] || [[word:jasamash|jasamash]] || [[word:shasamash|shasamash]] || [[word:kasamash|kasamash]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shasamash|shasamash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshasamash|goshasamash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishasamash|gokishasamash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shasamashnĂŒ|shasamashnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshasamashnknĂŒ|goshasamashnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishasamashnĂŒ|gokishasamashnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shasamashĂ«|shasamashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshasamashnkshĂ«|goshasamashnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishasamashĂ«|gokishasamashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasamashro|shasamashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasamashnkro|goshasamashnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasamashro|gokishasamashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shasamashmu|shasamashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasamashnkmu|goshasamashnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasamashmu|gokishasamashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shasamasher|shasamasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshasamashnksher|goshasamashnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishasamasher|gokishasamasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shasamashng|shasamashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshasamashnkng|goshasamashnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishasamashng|gokishasamashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shasamashya|shasamashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshasamashnkya|goshasamashnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishasamashya|gokishasamashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shasamashyam|shasamashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshasamashnkyam|goshasamashnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishasamashyam|gokishasamashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasamashnĂŒshĂ«|shasamashnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasamashnknĂŒshĂ«|goshasamashnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasamashnĂŒshĂ«|gokishasamashnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasamashnĂŒro|shasamashnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasamashnknĂŒro|goshasamashnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasamashnĂŒro|gokishasamashnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasamashnĂŒmu|shasamashnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasamashnknĂŒmu|goshasamashnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasamashnĂŒmu|gokishasamashnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasamashĂ«nĂŒ|shasamashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasamashnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshasamashnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasamashĂ«nĂŒ|gokishasamashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasamashĂ«ro|shasamashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasamashnkshĂ«ro|goshasamashnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasamashĂ«ro|gokishasamashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasamashĂ«mu|shasamashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasamashnkshĂ«mu|goshasamashnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasamashĂ«mu|gokishasamashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasamashronĂŒ|shasamashronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasamashnkronĂŒ|goshasamashnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasamashronĂŒ|gokishasamashronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasamashroshĂ«|shasamashroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasamashnkroshĂ«|goshasamashnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasamashroshĂ«|gokishasamashroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasamashromu|shasamashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasamashnkromu|goshasamashnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasamashromu|gokishasamashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasamashmunĂŒ|shasamashmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasamashnkmunĂŒ|goshasamashnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasamashmunĂŒ|gokishasamashmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasamashmushĂ«|shasamashmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasamashnkmushĂ«|goshasamashnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasamashmushĂ«|gokishasamashmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasamashmuro|shasamashmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasamashnkmuro|goshasamashnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasamashmuro|gokishasamashmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
